query: DELETE c FROM calls c INNER JOIN (SELECT batchDialerCallId, MIN(id) as minId FROM calls WHERE batchDialerCallId IS NOT NULL GROUP BY batchDialerCallId HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) dupes ON c.batchDialerCallId = dupes.batchDialerCallId WHERE c.id != dupes.minId;
